verdicts.xg_form_vs_shot_form: xG-form does NOT beat the free shot proxy (shots >= xg on hold+cv); +both ~= +shots -> real xG not worth RapidAPI quota for OUTCOME
verdicts.totals_premium: box-entries / big-chances / xG do NOT improve TOTALS beyond recent goal-form (worse on cv) -> null
verdicts.corners_entries: final-third entries / box touches do NOT improve CORNERS beyond recent corner rate (n=56 looked +0.13 but flipped to worse at n=183) -> null
verdicts.actionable: ONLY the free ESPN shot-form is worth wiring (already wired); no Sofascore-premium feature justified -> reserve quota
